title: Onboarding - Animations
scenario: Verify animations play correctly during the device onboarding flow, including interactions like tapping, swiping, and replaying.
steps: Launch the app with a connected device (Osprey/Term/Emu)
Navigate to Poly Lens Menu > User Guides

While animations play, test the following interactions:
   - Tap on the animation
   - Swipe right/left
   - Tap 'Next'
   - Tap 'X'
   - Tap 'Done' or 'User Guide'
Confirm animations play correctly on every screen
Replay the onboarding and confirm animations play correctly on subsequent replays
expected: Animations play correctly on every screen during the onboarding flow, including on subsequent replays. All interactions (tapping on animation, swiping, tapping Next/X/Done/User Guide) work as expected without breaking the animation playback.
